cross_scene_arcs.title: The Pursuit of Control: Securing Power of Attorney
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: John Cedar systematically works to gain legal authority over Longfellow Deeds' fortune by pursuing Power of Attorney, shifting from direct offers to strategic manipulation and legal coercion as resistance mounts.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Cedar formally offers to take full control of Longfellow's affairs, positioning himself as steward of the inheritance.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Cedar successfully pressures Henry Semple to sign a legal agreement, activating asset seizure and asserting control over the estate.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The Power of Attorney over Deeds remains unsecured, and Cedar's reliance on indirect legal maneuvers reveals the fragility of his control.

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Investigator to Public Foe: The Rise of Media Scrutiny
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Cedar transitions from a behind-the-scenes operative to a central figure of public and institutional attention, culminating in his portrayal as a legal antagonist in the media and courtroom.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Cedar arrives in Mandrake Falls as an investigator, relatively unknown and focused on locating Deeds.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Cedar is named as a key legal adversary in a high-profile case, symbolizing institutional power and elite manipulation.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The author of the newspaper articles exposing Cedar remains unknown, threatening to further destabilize his public image and authority.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Erosion of Authority: Internal and External Challenges
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Cedar faces mounting opposition from within his own circle and from external defenders of Deeds, leading to the collapse of his legal strategy despite initial dominance.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Cedar asserts authority upon returning to his office, preparing to manage a critical mission.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Cedar's prosecution collapses in court as the judge rules in favor of Deeds, leaving him defeated and discredited.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The failure of Cedar's legal campaign jeopardizes elite control over the Semple fortune, with no clear path to recovery.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Mentorship or Manipulation: The Cedar-Deeds Relationship
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Cedar's relationship with Deeds evolves from professional assessment to a complex dynamic of influence and resistance, as Cedar attempts to position himself as protector while Deeds grows increasingly wary.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Cedar evaluates Deeds' character upon discovering his dual identity as poet and businessman.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Cedar remains the only legal figure in Deeds' orbit, yet still untrusted and unappointed, highlighting the limits of his influence.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Deeds' skepticism toward all legal intermediaries, including Cedar, suggests ongoing resistance to full assimilation into elite financial systems.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Rejection of Elite Conformity
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Longfellow resists increasing pressure to conform to the expectations of wealth and status, culminating in his decisive departure from the city and its corrupt systems.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Longfellow asserts autonomy by rejecting formal attire and ejecting his attorney.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: He physically leaves the mansion, breaking from the urban elite world for good.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The broader structural forces of wealth and manipulation remain intact, and his absence may leave others vulnerable.

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Idealism to Disillusionment and Renewal
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Spurred by personal betrayal and public cruelty, Longfellow's idealism collapses into disillusionment, only to be reborn as a structured mission to address social inequality through radical philanthropy.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: He expresses reverence for American ideals at Grant's Tomb, inspiring Babe's admiration.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: He institutionalizes his charity, transforming his home into an office to distribute aid at scale.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The overwhelming demand for aid threatens to undermine the sustainability and fairness of his mission.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Fracture and Test of Trust with Babe
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Longfellow and Babe's relationship evolves from playful connection to deep emotional intimacy, shatters due to betrayal, and faces uncertain reconciliation after his public vindication.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Deeds shares a poem about Babe, deepening emotional intimacy.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: The court affirms his sanity, and though celebrated, Babe remains emotionally isolated, leaving their bond unresolved.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Babe's loyalty and capacity for honest connection remain in question despite her apparent remorse.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Public Perception vs. Personal Authenticity
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Longfellow's genuine actions are consistently misinterpreted by the public and media, shifting his image from honored figure to mocked eccentric to revered moral leader, while he strives to remain true to himself.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: He anonymously plays tuba in the town band instead of attending his own farewell ceremony.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Morrow, once antagonistic, publicly apologizes and embraces Longfellow as a figure of moral authority.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The media's power to shape perception persists, and Longfellow remains wary of being co-opted despite his growing influence.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Trial of Integrity
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Framed as insane to strip him of his fortune, Longfellow endures a legal and psychological assault that tests his sanity, silence, and moral resolve—ultimately prevailing through passive endurance and public vindication.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: He remains unresponsive to Cobb's warnings in the hospital, emotionally detached.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: The court rules him sane, affirming his mental clarity and right to control his wealth.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether his silence was strategic defiance or a sign of trauma remains ambiguous, and the system that targeted him remains unchanged.
